name: hermit
description: A Discord bot built with Carbon

scripts.deploy:cf: bunx wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote && bun run forms:css && wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:cf:preview: bun run forms:css && wrangler deploy --env-file .env --keep-vars --var FORMS_DEV:1
scripts.forms:css: postcss src/forms/styles.css -o src/forms/styles.generated.css && bun scripts/css-to-ts.ts src/forms/styles.generated.css src/forms/styles.generated.ts
scripts.dev:forms: bun run forms:css && wrangler dev --port 3001 --env-file .env --var FORMS_DEV:1 --var FORMS_BASE_URL:http://localhost:3001
